title: Linscraft&AlsaceTeam “Creative Connect” Season 1
body:
**林氏创艺&阿尔萨斯工业“创艺连结”系列活动第一季《方块里的夏天》**

---
**Linscraft&AlsaceTeam “Creative Connect” Season 1:Crafting Summer Memories**

---

炎炎假日，总会让人回忆起儿时的暑假。也许是在老家悠闲度日，也许是和家人避暑出游，又或者是每周期盼的夏季动画。回忆着这段时光，也想着和他人一同分享！我们决定开展“夏日假期”现代建筑主题活动！我们想要征集符合你暑期回忆的建筑作品！并将这些作品制作成自定义结构数据包，邀请所有我的世界玩家参观游玩，从而将这份回忆传达出去~

During the scorching summer holidays, people often recall their childhood summers. Maybe it was leisurely days in the hometown, or family trips to escape the heat, or the eagerly awaited summer animations every week. Recalling these times, we also want to share them with others! We have decided to launch a "Summer Vacation" modern architecture theme event! We are looking for architectural works that match your summer memories! These works will be made into custom structure data packs and invited all Minecraft players to visit and play, thus spreading this memory~
